name: algol60-wasm
description: Compile an ALGOL 60 source file to a WebAssembly module.

flags.description: Output .wasm path. Defaults to SOURCE with a .wasm suffix.
Do not print the output path after a successful compile.

commands.name: run
commands.description: Compile an ALGOL 60 source file in memory and run its WASM _start export.

flags.description: Maximum WASM instructions to execute before trapping.
Print the _start return values to stderr after program output.

arguments.description: ALGOL 60 source file to compile and run.
